definition_or_rule: Production or biomass output of crop or production system
examples: crop yield; productivity; root biomass; shoot biomass; system yield
gross margin; net return; benefit-cost ratio; gross income; production costs; net present value

definition_or_rule: Abundance richness diversity or community structure of organisms
examples: bird richness; arthropod richness; microbial diversity; Shannon index; species richness

definition_or_rule: Pollinator abundance richness diversity or pollination service
examples: pollinator richness; pollinator diversity; bee pollination

definition_or_rule: Pest disease weed damage or natural enemy control
examples: pest damage; weed biomass; disease incidence; predator richness; pathogen control
sign_rule: invert pest damage infestation and weed burden variables

definition_or_rule: Hydrology water retention runoff leaching or water-use outcomes
examples: soil moisture; infiltration rate; runoff; N leaching; water-use efficiency
sign_rule: invert runoff sediment and leaching losses when harmful

definition_or_rule: Soil health nutrient availability organic matter biology or structure
examples: SOC; available N; available P; soil C; soil pH; microbial biomass; aggregate stability
sign_rule: invert soil loss bulk density and harmful losses when appropriate

definition_or_rule: Nutrient pools fluxes uptake microbial cycling and use efficiency
examples: N use efficiency; nitrate N; plant P uptake; microbial biomass N; total N
sign_rule: invert leaching runoff and nutrient loss variables when harmful

definition_or_rule: Carbon stocks pools or sequestration outcomes
examples: SOC stocks; soil C; dissolved organic C; total C

definition_or_rule: Greenhouse gas climate or nitrogen-loss outcomes
examples: CH4 emission; CO2 emission; N2O emission; global warming potential; N2 fixation
sign_rule: invert emissions and global warming potential

definition_or_rule: Aboveground living non-crop elements in or around farming systems
examples: hedgerow; buffer strip; grass cover; living mulch; agroforestry; livestock incorporation
sign_rule: code separately from crop diversification when possible

definition_or_rule: Animal or plant derived material added to improve soil health
examples: manure; straw amendment; compost; biochar; organic fertilizer
sign_rule: record amendment type and rate if available

definition_or_rule: Multiple crop species or varieties within a farming system
examples: crop rotation; cover cropping; intercropping; cultivar mixture; polyculture; catch cropping

definition_or_rule: Lower soil disturbance by limiting mechanical tillage
examples: no tillage; direct seeding; minimum tillage; subsoiling tillage
sign_rule: separate from residue retention if possible

definition_or_rule: Production system governed by organic management rules
sign_rule: treat as bundled practice rather than single mechanism

definition_or_rule: Beneficial microorganisms added to soil seeds or plants
examples: AMF inoculation; EMF inoculation; rhizobia co-inoculation
sign_rule: record organism group and host/crop context
